en: Hello.
Mom. Hi.
Why do you guys look so down?
You said the season's over, and you only did, like, two videos.
ko: 시즌 끝났다면서, 영상도 두 개밖에 안 했잖아.

en: Did, like, three at least. Doesn't matter.
ko: 적어도 세 개는 했거든. 그건 중요한 게 아니야.

en: It's just with everything going on in the news right now, it's just things feel kind of bleak.
ko: 그냥 요즘 뉴스에서 벌어지는 일들 때문에, 좀 암울한 느낌이야.

en: Yeah, I just feel like the world is falling apart.
Hey, you know what you guys need? A vacation.
ko: 야, 너희한테 뭐가 필요한지 알아? 휴가.

en: Vacation? We have work.
ko: 휴가? 일이 있는데. 비쌀 텐데. 쉿.

en: It'll be expensive. Oh, shh.
Tickets are on me.
You ever flown first class before?
What do you say, boys?
A little vacay?
-♪ Mama, I've been wanting this my whole life ♪ -♪ First-class ticket-watching recline ♪
ko: -♪ 엄마, 평생 이걸 원했어 ♪ -♪ 퍼스트 클래스 좌석에 기대서 ♪

en: -♪ ScarJo got the effin' vibe right ♪ -♪ Whole lot feelin' like a highlight ♪
ko: -♪ ScarJo가 분위기를 제대로 잡았어 ♪ -♪ 전부 하이라이트 같은 기분 ♪

en: -♪ Hasta luego to all of my haters ♪ ♪ Ballin' like Dwayne Wade, I'm one of the greatest ♪
ko: -♪ 안티들한테 안녕 ♪ ♪ Dwayne Wade처럼 잘 나가, 난 최고 중 하나야 ♪

en: -♪ Flight attendant with a thick old thang ♪ -♪ Handin' me drinks like Goof King ♪
-♪ If you ain't up on sign ♪ -♪ ScarJ is the name when you're dealing with planes ♪
ko: -♪ 모르겠으면 알아둬 ♪ -♪ 비행기 타면 ScarJ가 이름이야 ♪

en: -♪ Woo! -♪ Now listen up, I'm talkin' to you, jerk Ballin' in the sky all the way to Newark
ko: -♪ 우! -♪ 잘 들어, 너한테 하는 말이야 Newark까지 하늘에서 있는 대로 즐겨

en: Did you say Newark?
Yeah, why? What's up?
No, it's... We're landing at Newark?
Yeah, Newark.
In New Jersey.
Damn, it's kind of windy out there, huh?
ko: 와, 밖에 바람 좀 부는데, 그치?

en: Didn't we fly out of LaGuardia?
It's like a half-hour drive.
No, but this is awesome.
Come on, I mean, we're in first class, right?
Now I'm up in first class, hittin' on a spritz fast I don't got time, so I wear a wristwatch.
ko: 지금 퍼스트 클래스에서 칵테일 들이키는 중. 시간이 없어서 손목시계를 차

en: Is something going on at Newark?
Like, are there planes crashing there or something?
ko: 거기서 비행기 사고 나는 거 아니야?

en: No, I think they're just, like, losing them.
ko: 아니, 그냥 비행기를 놓치는 거 같은데.

en: Losing the planes?
Yeah, like, losing track.
Yeah, right, they're losing the planes in Newark, but the crashing is happening, like,
ko: 맞아, Newark에서 비행기 추적을 잃고 있는 건데, 사고는

en: everywhere all the time now.
ko: 요즘 어디서든 계속 나고 있잖아. 아, 맞다. 그래.

en: Oh, yeah. Right. Yeah.
Are you not nervous?
♪ Bitch, I ain't scared of no plane ♪ I'm chillin' and I'm bringin' it on Ow!
ko: ♪ 난 비행기 따위 안 무서워 ♪ 여유롭게 즐기는 중이야. 아야!

en: Woo! Yeah, just gonna sit down and buckle up, didn't like that at all.
ko: 우! 그래, 앉아서 안전벨트 매야겠다, 저건 진짜 싫었어.

en: Apologies for the turbulence, folks, but good news, we've been cleared for landing at Newark.
ko: 난기류 죄송합니다, 승객 여러분. 좋은 소식은 Newark 착륙 허가를 받았습니다.

en: At least I think so.
Haven't heard anything yet. Oh, no.
ko: 아직 아무 연락도 못 받았거든요. 이런.

en: Hmm, that's not good.
Nah, that's scary.
All the TV's just turned off.
Once we land, I should be good.
Once we land, I'll be all right.
I'm just gonna meditate, too.
ko: 나도 명상이나 할게. 하나님이 지켜주실 거야. 항상 지켜주시잖아.

en: God's got me. God's always got me.
♪ I can't be alone with the thoughts in my dome ♪ Mark, do you have any shows in your phone
ko: ♪ 머릿속 생각이랑 혼자 있을 수 없어 ♪ Mark, 폰에 볼 거 있어?

en: The only show I have is Lost.
I only have the pilot of Lost.
Why would you only have that one?
I didn't know I'd be here today!
Uh, bad news, folks, we are what we call in the biz, flying blind. Oh, God!
ko: 안 좋은 소식입니다, 승객 여러분. 업계 용어로 '맹목 비행' 중입니다. 세상에!

en: Okay, be honest, do you think we'll make the article, at least? What?
ko: 좋아, 솔직히, 우리 최소한 기사에는 나올까? 뭐?

en: Do you think the article will be, like, Scarlett Johansson and Please Don't Destroy Diane?
ko: 그 기사에 Scarlett Johansson이랑 Please Don't Destroy Diane이 나올 거라고 생각해?

en: playing Crash, or just you? What's Please Don't Destroy?
ko: 비행기 추락, 이렇게 나올까 아니면 너만? Please Don't Destroy가 뭔데?

en: Who did you think we were?
Uh, pardon me while I give a quick call to our air traffic controller.
ko: 잠시 실례하고, 항공 관제사한테 전화 좀 할게요.

en: Come on, pick up, pick up, pick up, pick up, pick up. Hello? Hi.
ko: 제발, 받아, 받아, 받아, 받아, 받아. 여보세요? 안녕하세요.

en: Are you having fun up there?
No, I'm not having fun.
Sir, do you have our coordinates?
I don't know. It's my first day.
What?! It's your first day?! Yeah.
There's, like, no one here.
Oh, fantastic.
Maybe you tell me, like, what color is your plane?
ko: 그러면 비행기 색깔이 뭔지 말해줄 수 있어요?

en: It's a freaking plane! I'm gonna find the emergency exit, then I'm gonna jump.
Do not open the emergency exit! I want to!
Oh, God! That's a new one!
Uh-oh, looks like this is it, guys.
ko: 이런, 이게 마지막인 것 같아, 얘들아.

en: Anything to get off your chest?
This might sound corny, but the only thing I regret is...
ko: 좀 촌스럽게 들릴 수 있는데, 내가 후회하는 건...

en: is that Avengers didn't make more money at the box office. What?!
ko: 어벤져스가 박스오피스에서 더 많이 벌지 못한 거야. 뭐?!

en: We are going down!
If anybody can help us, please, please!
ko: 누가 좀 도와줄 수 있으면, 제발, 제발!

en: I can't give up on them.
Yes, if I just...
forkade their coordinates...
I'm starting to get my signal back.
...and conclade that we need assistance.
Hang on! I see the runway! I see the runway!
I think I'm doing a good job.
I think I'm saving them.
ko: 내가 그들을 구하고 있는 것 같아.

en: Oh, my God, it's working. It's working!
I can see you now.
You're on the mainframe.
Now glide up, glide up, and land this plane. Oh!
ko: 자, 기수를 올려, 올려, 그리고 착륙해요. 와!

en: We did it! Yes!
I'm so happy. Yes!
Now we can finally enjoy our vacation in Newark!
ko: 이제 드디어 Newark에서 휴가를 즐길 수 있어!

en: Oh, yeah.
You can do anything you put your mind to.
